requirement_topic.en: China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964-2024 Evidence Versus Uzbekistan Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964-2024证据与乌兹别克斯坦接受要求
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964-2024證據與烏茲別克斯坦接受要求

summary.en: Uzbekistan import, market-access, and grid-connection decisions are based on O'zstandart conformity certification, O'z DSt national standards (many derived from GOST or IEC), and project/network-operator approvals. Chinese GB/T reports are best treated as capability evidence to be mapped against Uzbekistan O'zstandart and O'z DSt/GOST/IEC requirements, not as automatically recognized conformity documents. O'zstandart mandatory certification is the market-access gate for regulated electrical products.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦进口、市场准入和并网决定基于O'zstandart符合性认证、O'z DSt国家标准（大量派生自GOST或IEC）以及项目/电网运营商批准。中国GB/T报告最好作为能力证据映射至乌兹别克斯坦O'zstandart和O'z DSt/GOST/IEC要求，而不是视为自动认可的符合性文件。O'zstandart强制认证是受监管电气产品的市场准入门槛。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦進口、市場准入和併網決定基於O'zstandart符合性認證、O'z DSt國家標準（大量派生自GOST或IEC）以及項目/電網運營商批准。中國GB/T報告最好作為能力證據映射至烏茲別克斯坦O'zstandart和O'z DSt/GOST/IEC要求，而不是視為自動認可的符合性文件。O'zstandart強制認證是受監管電氣產品的市場准入門檻。

standards_or_laws: O'zstandart mandatory conformity certification for regulated electrical products
O'z DSt national standards (many derived from GOST / IEC) for PV inverters
National Electric Grid of Uzbekistan / regional energy company connection technical conditions

summary.en: GB/T 37408-2021 is the common China product technical requirement for PV grid-connected inverters, and GB/T 19964-2024 is the common China technical regulation for PV power stations connected to the power system. Together they are a strong China-side dossier, but they do not create O'zstandart certification rights, Uzbekistan project-auction eligibility, or Uzenergo grid approval.
summary.zh: GB/T 37408-2021是中国光伏并网逆变器常用产品技术要求，GB/T 19964-2024是中国光伏发电站接入电力系统常用技术规定。二者共同构成较强的中国侧资料包，但不会产生O'zstandart认证权利、乌兹别克斯坦项目竞价资格或Uzenergo并网批准。
summary.zht: GB/T 37408-2021是中國光伏併網逆變器常用產品技術要求，GB/T 19964-2024是中國光伏發電站接入電力系統常用技術規定。二者共同構成較強的中國側資料包，但不會產生O'zstandart認證權利、烏茲別克斯坦項目競價資格或Uzenergo併網批准。

gap.en: The key gap is recognition and mapping. Exporters should prepare a clause-by-clause bridge from GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964-2024 to O'z DSt/GOST/IEC 62109 requirements, O'zstandart conformity certification, project grid-code settings, Uzbek-language user and installation documentation, and any lender technical specifications demanded by IFC/EBRD or project financiers.
gap.zh: 关键差距是认可和映射。出口商应准备GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964-2024到O'z DSt/GOST/IEC 62109要求、O'zstandart符合性认证、项目并网参数、乌兹别克语用户和安装文件，以及IFC/EBRD或项目融资方要求的出借方技术规范的逐条桥接表。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距是認可和映射。出口商應準備GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964-2024到O'z DSt/GOST/IEC 62109要求、O'zstandart符合性認證、項目併網參數、烏茲別克語使用者和安裝文件，以及IFC/EBRD或項目融資方要求的出借方技術規範的逐條橋接表。

mandatory_status.target: Not a Uzbekistan legal route by itself; O'zstandart conformity certification, O'z DSt/GOST/IEC standards, and project requirements remain mandatory where applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Common China-side technical evidence; mandatory or recommended effect depends on the China project and purchaser context

source.publisher: National Public Service Platform for Standards Information, State Administration for Market Regulation of China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964-2024 are useful starting evidence, but Uzbekistan compliance requires separate O'zstandart certification, O'z DSt/GOST/IEC standards mapping, grid approval, and project-specific documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964-2024是有用的起点证据，但乌兹别克斯坦合规需要单独完成O'zstandart认证、O'z DSt/GOST/IEC标准映射、并网批准和项目专属文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964-2024是有用的起點證據，但烏茲別克斯坦合規需要單獨完成O'zstandart認證、O'z DSt/GOST/IEC標準映射、併網批准和項目專屬文件。
